title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/09/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.70% today, the main contract closed 722.5. Some traders were active to sell. More steel mills tended topurchase, and purchasing enthusiasm is high.
